name: Daikin AC WiFi (S403)
summary: Control the Daikin MTKL50UV16VA AC over WiFi via its S403 service port (S21 protocol), plus an IR blaster for the Orient Zeno fan — one shared ESP32, fully inside the AC, powered from the 14V rail.
safety: S403 port is NON-isolated — GND sits at mains potential, pin 10 ~320V. The ADuM1201 (or 6N139 opto) isolation barrier is mandatory.
Bench-test the harness voltages BEFORE connecting to the AC: pin1<->6 ~14V, pin4<->6 ~5V, pin5<->6 ~5V.
All work with the AC unplugged.
